description_for_human: Find nurse practitioner (NP) jobs across all 50 US states, with salary shown when employers provide it.
description_for_model: NP Hiring is a specialized job board for Nurse Practitioners covering every NP specialty (FNP, AGNP, PNP, NNP, WHNP, ACNP, PMHNP) plus CRNA, CNM, and CNS roles. Use this to search NP jobs by location, setting (remote, telehealth, inpatient, outpatient, hospital, private practice), specialty, job type (full-time, part-time, contract, per diem, travel, locum tenens), and experience level (new grad, entry-level, mid-career, senior). Listings are aggregated daily from employer applicant-tracking systems, and salary is displayed whenever the source posting provides it. A plain-text overview for LLMs is available at https://nphiring.com/llms-full.txt.
